The '''Battle of Brigia''' took place during the early years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Background==
The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had learned of a new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] operation codenamed [[Operation Strike Fear|"Strike Fear"]], that would hit their [[Brigia Rebel base|base]] on [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]] as its first target. Knowing that the Rebel fleet stationed there was no match for the Imperial forces, the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] organized an extensive evacuation of Rebel personnel stationed on the planet.

==The Battle==
All available transports were used to load up equipment and personnel, with the most important personnel boarding the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] group ''[[Arroyo]]''. During the battle, [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] assisted by [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]] were charged with protecting the shuttles. The Y-wings would provide close escort while the X-wings moved to engage any enemy fighters. Meanwhile [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] were responsible for protecting base equipment transports.

Shortly after the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Fugazi]]'' escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], the evacuation was interrupted by the arrival of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], which immediately began launching [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

In the immediate volley, the corvette ''Mahan'' and transport group ''Rhoon'' were immediately overwhelmed and destroyed by the guns on the ''Invincible''.

The Rebels engaged the Imperial TIEs holding them off long enough for ''Arroyo'' and the remainder of the fleet to escape. However, Rebel losses were large.

==Aftermath==
Wounded from the evacuation operation would later be [[Skirmish near Brigia|transferred]] to the [[Hospital ship/Legends|medical frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']] by the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Korolev]]''. Though losses had been substantial, the Rebel Alliance still maintained the capacity to strike, and their most senior personnel on Brigia were saved.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{C|As Battle of Briggia}} {{1st}}
